title: The Crew Reaches Whiskey Peak
description: On pages 4–5, the crew reaches whiskey peak as after facing the Grand Line’s bizarre weather, the crew reaches Whiskey Peak and is greeted with suspicious enthusiasm.
scene: The Crew Reaches Whiskey Peak. After facing the Grand Line’s bizarre weather, the crew reaches Whiskey Peak and is greeted with suspicious enthusiasm. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: W-What is it!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's the matter, my beloved Nami!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This can't be happy- ending!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Turn the ship around 180 degrees! Hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 180 degrees? Why're we turning back?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did we forget something?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No! The ship turned /75ELF around and is now heading directly away from our destination!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I only took my eyes off of the log pose for a second and the waves were so calm too...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Looks like you've been played by the waves.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are you really a Navigator?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: That's the kind of ocean this is. The winds, skies, waves, and even the clouds...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You can't trust any of them.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The only thing you can trust out here is in the direction your log pose points!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Do you understand?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop acting so high and mighty and start helping out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Catch the wind from the right side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We'll use it to turn the ship around 180 degrees to the left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: usopp, you take the jib sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sanji, you take the rudder!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What a violent woman...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just leave it to me, Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And be quiet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, wait! The winds just changed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That can't be!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ah, the first breeze of spring.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Zoro, wake up! We're in an emergency!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the crew reaches whiskey peak. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
